data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Files read. Summary: (1) check-onboarding.sh has /dso:design-onboarding and /dso:dev-onboarding references in comments and JSON output. (2) validate-review-output.sh has dev-onboarding in 7 locations (comment header, hash var declaration, usage(), --list-callers, CALLER_SCHEMA dict key, case statement). Need to add architect-foundation in parallel. (3) .test-index - stale entries already absent (must have been cleaned earlier). (4) dso-setup.sh has no skill name references to update.
